hooks.command:
bash -c 'printf "
  ● di.iiii session started
  CURRENT.md:

"; cat CURRENT.md 2>/dev/null || printf "  (CURRENT.md not found — run git pull)
"; EXPECTED=$(grep -m1 "^active_branch:" CURRENT.md 2>/dev/null | sed "s/active_branch: *//"); ACTUAL=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$EXPECTED" ] && [ -n "$ACTUAL" ] && [ "$EXPECTED" != "$ACTUAL" ]; then printf "
  ⚠  BRANCH MISMATCH: CURRENT.md expects branch "$EXPECTED" but you are on "$ACTUAL"
  Switch branch or update active_branch: in CURRENT.md

"; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "src/shared/.*Schema\.js$" && BASE=$(basename "$FILE" .js) && printf "
  ⚡ SCHEMA SYNC REQUIRED
  You are editing: %s
  → Also update: shared/%s.cjs (CJS mirror that serverXR actually loads)
  → Forgetting this = 503 on deploy (server crashes on startup)
  → Check diff before saving: diff %s shared/%s.cjs | head -40

" "$FILE" "$BASE" "$FILE" "$BASE"; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -q "vite.config.js" && printf "
  ⚡ VITE three-vendor CHECK
  Every pkg that imports three must be in the three-vendor chunk.
  Missing one → TDZ crash in production (invisible in dev).
  Required members: three, three-mesh-bvh, three-stdlib,
    @react-three/*, @react-spring/three, troika-*,
    camera-controls, detect-gpu, maath,
    @monogrid/gainmap-js, meshoptimizer, meshline,
    r3f-perf, @pmndrs/*, @iwer/*
  After editing: npx vite build 2>&1 | grep -i circular

"; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(auth|session|db\.js|migrate|spaceStore|projectStore|Dockerfile|config\.js)" && echo "" && echo "  ● High-signal file edited: $FILE" && echo "    If this revealed something non-obvious → ./scripts/capture-rule.sh" && echo ""; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(js|jsx|cjs|mjs)$" || exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -q "node_modules" && exit 0; RESULT=$(npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1); CODE=$?; [[ $CODE -eq 0 ]] && exit 0; printf "
  ✗ Lint failed in %s:
%s
  → Fix before committing
" "$FILE" "$RESULT"; exit 2'

bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -q "AGENTS.md" || exit 0; RESULT=$(npm run docs:ai:sync --silent 2>&1 && npm run docs:ai:check --silent 2>&1); CODE=$?; [[ $CODE -eq 0 ]] && printf "  ● docs:ai:sync ran after AGENTS.md edit
" && exit 0; printf "  ✗ docs:ai:sync failed:
%s
  → Run npm run docs:ai:sync manually
" "$RESULT"; exit 2'
